# Garage Goat Garage Doors

## About
Garage Goat Garage Doors is a locally owned garage door repair and installation company
headquartered in Cypress, TX, serving the NW Houston metro area since 2010.
TDLR Licensed (#GDC-7742). 4.9-star Google rating with 287+ reviews.

## Services
- Garage Door Repair
- Garage Door Spring Repair & Replacement
- Garage Door Opener Repair & Installation
- New Garage Door Installation & Sales
- 24/7 Emergency Garage Door Repair

## Service Areas
- Cypress, TX (headquarters)
- Tomball, TX
- The Woodlands, TX
- Magnolia, TX
- Hockley, TX
- Spring, TX
- Northwest Houston, TX

## Contact
- Phone: (281) 948-5452
- Email: info@garagegoatdoors.com
- Address: 12507 Stoney Mill St, Cypress, TX 77429
- Website: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com

## Warranties
- Labor: 1 Year
- Parts: 3 Year
- Springs: Lifetime

- Free Estimates
- Locally Owned
- Fully Insured
- Customer Satisfaction Guarantee
